# sendVerificationEmail

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the sendVerificationEmail mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk send-verification-email --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.email <Email>
```
